name: Refresh Documents Button
notes: onClick fires handleRefresh() which delegates directly to loadDocuments() — the same method called on componentDidMount.
Sets loading=true and clears error state before issuing GET /api/documents; replaces the entire in-memory documents array on success.
The error state's Retry button (DocumentGrid.jsx:951) also calls handleRefresh(), making Retry and Refresh functionally identical — both re-run loadDocuments().
Backend route queries documents_v2 (not the original documents table); auth required via JWT, session, or API key unless DEV_SKIP_AUTH=true env flag is set.
